title: Creating a Simple API Endpoint
scenario: A developer wants to create a simple API endpoint that returns a string 'Hello, World!' in response to a GET request. The target output should be a formatted code string that meets the requirements.
constraints: Must return a string 'Hello, World!' in response to a GET request
Must be in a simple programming language

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the constraints (returning the correct data and simplicity)
Check if the code syntax is valid
Check if the output is well-formatted and easy to read
